cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. Let me start by going through each of the given information points and see how they fit together. First, David woke up at 5am. So he's not asleep after that. Then Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, he's at the electronics store. Next, Kimberly saw him near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. Then Betty saw him at the gym from 9am to 12pm. Lisa saw him driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. William saw him on a rooftop from 3pm to 10pm. Also, the football field was closed after 10pm, so he had to go before that. Now, the question is, between what times could David have gone to the football field? The options are A (6-8am), B (5-6am), C (3-10pm), D (8am-9am). Let me map out David's schedule: - 5am: wakes up - 5am-6am: at electronics store (Steven) - 6am-8am: at Leaning Tower of Pisa (Kimberly) - 8am-9am: ??? - 9am-12pm: at gym (Betty) - 12pm-3pm: driving to water park (Lisa) - 3pm-10pm: on rooftop (William) - After 10pm: football field closed So the times when David is unaccounted for are 8am to 9am. Because from 5-6, he's at the store. 6-8 at Pisa. Then 8-9 is free. Then 9-12 at gym, etc. So the only time slot when he's not seen is 8am to 9am. So he could have gone to the football field during that time. The football field is open until 10pm, so as long as he goes before 10pm, but he can't go after that. But he also can't go during times when he was seen doing other things. Looking at the options: A. 6am-8am: But during this time, he was at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, so he can't be at two places at once. So A is not possible. B. 5am-6am: He was at the electronics store with Steven, so B is also not possible. C. 3pm-10pm: During this time, he was on the rooftop with William. So he can't be at the football field then. Plus, the field closes at 10pm, so he couldn't have gone exactly at 10pm. But even before 10pm, he was with William. So C is out. D. 8am-9am: This is the only time slot when he isn't accounted for.
